industrialOneDealFoundation.layer: Canonical PostgreSQL deal command path and shared role workspace
invariants: one deal identity and factual state for all roles
trusted transaction-local RLS for canonical reads and writes
strict full-command fingerprint idempotency inside the trusted transaction
no human confirmation of bank reserve or release

schema migrations and RLS policies apply only to the ephemeral database

19 commands execute in deterministic order without direct DB mutation
reserve and release require signed callbacks bound to pending operations
duplicate stale concurrent and cross-tenant cases fail deterministically
closed projections and evidence chains reconcile
teardown destroys test data and credentials
